name: design-and-implement-review-loop
title: design-and-implement-review-loop
description: Shared workflow for either full issue resolution or planning-only Codex-reference design and implementation-plan handoff, with explicit review gates, an issue-resolution user-facing documentation refresh step, a final commit-message step, built-in git commit and git push steps, and return paths.
